languages.text: Император слеплен из костей и ошметков плоти. Кровавый Владыка молча взирает на подданных сверху вниз, пока его тело опаляют языки пламени.

traits.locale_text: Император слеплен из костей и ошметков плоти. Кровавый Владыка молча взирает на подданных сверху вниз, пока его тело опаляют языки пламени.
Император слеплен из костей и ошметков плоти. Кровавый Владыка молча взирает на подданных сверху вниз, пока его тело опаляют языки пламени.

languages.text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.
languages.original_text: Император слеплен из костей и ошметков плоти. Кровавый Владыка молча взирает на подданных сверху вниз, пока его тело опаляют языки пламени.

traits.locale_text: The effigy of the Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.
The effigy of the Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.
The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.

languages.text: Der Imperator ist aus Knochen und roten Fleischbrocken zusammengeschustert. Der sanguinische Beschützer blickt schweigend auf seine Untertanen herab, während Flammenzungen an seinem verkohlten Fleisch lecken.
languages.original_text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.

languages.text: L'Empereur est constitué d'os et de morceaux de viande rouge. Le Protecteur sanguin regarde silencieusement ses sujets tandis que des langues de flammes lèchent sa chair carbonisée.
languages.original_text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.

languages.text: 皇帝由骨头和大块红肉拼凑而成。当火焰的舌头舔舐着他烧焦的肉体时，脸色阴沉的守护者静静地俯视着他的臣民。
languages.original_text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.

languages.text: El Emperador está hecho de huesos y trozos de carne roja. El sanguíneo Protector mira en silencio a sus súbditos mientras lenguas de fuego lamen su carne carbonizada.
languages.original_text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.

languages.text: 皇帝は骨と赤身のかたまりで作られている。炎の舌が黒焦げの肉をなめる中、悲観的な守護神は静かに臣下を見下ろしている。
languages.original_text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.

languages.text: İmparator, kemiklerden ve kırmızı et parçalarından bir araya getirilmiştir. Alev dilleri kömürleşmiş etini yalarken, iyimser Koruyucu sessizce tebaasına bakıyor.
languages.original_text: The Emperor is slapped together from bones and chunks of red meat. The sanguine Protector silently looks down at his subjects while tongues of flame lick at his charred flesh.
